name: Oclean smart toothbrush
description: Oclean smart toothbrush BLE protocol (Y3/Y3L and related models). Observer fingerprint, device-info quick action, and Y3L peripheral simulator.
author: Slawomir Jasek
notes: Subscribe OCLEAN_READ_NOTIFY (bb86) before writing OCLEAN_WRITE (bb85). Manual writes: use presets on bb85 (0303 battery, 030201 device info, 022201 pause). Manufacturer AD (type 0xFF) carries the 6-byte device address, not a Bluetooth SIG company ID. Peripheral sim sets that field from get_adv_bd_addr().
